name: NextClaw Skin Studio
summary: Choose from six lightweight NextClaw skins or create your own from colors and a local image.

summaryI18n.en: Choose from six lightweight NextClaw skins or create your own from colors and a local image.
summaryI18n.zh: 从六款轻量 NextClaw 皮肤中选择，或用配色和本地图片创建自己的皮肤。

description: Browse, apply, switch, customize, inspect, and remove NextClaw UI skins through the unsupported UI injection hook. The Skill bundles six self-contained skins, a shared deterministic renderer, local-image customization, conflict protection, and migration from the former Abyssal Compass package. Installation and activation remain separate, and no remote assets are loaded.

descriptionI18n.en: Browse, apply, switch, customize, inspect, and remove NextClaw UI skins through the unsupported UI injection hook. The Skill bundles six self-contained skins, a shared deterministic renderer, local-image customization, conflict protection, and migration from the former Abyssal Compass package. Installation and activation remain separate, and no remote assets are loaded.
descriptionI18n.zh: 通过非正式 UI 注入口浏览、应用、切换、定制、检查和移除 NextClaw 皮肤。Skill 内置六款自包含皮肤、一套确定性共享渲染器、本地图片定制、归属冲突保护，以及旧版「深海罗盘」包的迁移能力。安装与启用保持分离，且不加载远程资源。

author: NextClaw
